name: Shrimp with Jalapeno Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 Pickled Jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel shrimp, leaving the tail and first joint of the shell intact; cut a deep slit down the length of each shrimp and devein.
2. Bring water to a boil. Add shrimp and cook 3 to 5 minutes or until they turn pink. Drain well and rinse with cold water. Chill.
3. Combine cream cheese and remaining ingredients in a bowl; beat well.
4. Fill a decorating bag fitted with a metal tip No. 21 with the cream cheese mixture. Pipe filling lengthwise into the slits of the shrimp.
Yield: 16 to 18 appetizer servings.
